prompt: Optimize this MySQL join query joining customer (150K rows) and orders (1.5M rows)...
assertions: When the database is unreachable, output explicitly stops at a hard gate rather than producing a best-effort guess
Output reports which hard gate was hit (e.g., credential failure, all context sources fail) and gives a clear fix path
When the database IS reachable, the output identifies the GROUP BY temp table as a bottleneck
Output includes a context coverage report showing which sources were available
Output reports the number of strategies attempted and which (if any) produced validated rewrites
